heading: The name is the promise.
body1: Pariter is Latin for side by side — as equals, at the same pace. It shares a root with par and pair, so even without the Latin, most people already feel the meaning: equal footing, moving in step.
body2: That's not a tagline. It's how the firm works. We don't sit above you as a vendor who hands over a system and moves on. We come alongside — at your pace, in your business — and we stay as the work compounds.
pull: We grow when you grow. The relationship is the product.

who.heading: Established businesses running on hard work
who.body: We're built for companies in the $5M–$30M range — distribution, trades, logistics, and the like. Not software companies. Places where good people lose hours to admin that better-connected tools should be handling.
who.note: side by side · as equals · at your pace
